headline: TransDigm Completes Acquisition of Jet Parts Engineering and Victor Sierra Aviation Holdings
summary: TransDigm Group Incorporated (NYSE: TDG) today announced that it has successfully completed its acquisition of Jet Parts Engineering and Victor Sierra Aviation Holdings (collectively "the Companies"), formerly portfolio companies of Vance Street Capital, for approximately $2.2 billion in cash, including certain tax benefits. TransDigm financed the acquisition of the Companies through cash on hand as well as cash proceeds from the debt offerings completed in February 2026. The acquisition of the
